input: Run animation principles on this project
expected_behavior: Skill activates and produces the expected animation principles output following the defined process
Skill recognizes the trigger phrase and executes the animation principles workflow

input: Apply animation principles to analyze the current codebase with detailed output
expected_behavior: Skill produces comprehensive animation principles analysis with evidence-tagged findings
Skill activates with minimal input, applies reasonable defaults

input: What is the weather forecast for tomorrow?
expected_behavior: Skill should NOT activate — this input has no relation to animation principles
